notes: Render robustness: renderAll() now also refreshes the Instruments page and the Journal/dashboard tiles (and the Edit-my-inputs grid when visible), so a change made anywhere is reflected on every page immediately instead of relying on navigation to re-render. Previously renderAll covered Projection, Net Worth, Scenarios, Charts and Settings but skipped Instruments and Journal — those self-healed only when you navigated to them via activateSection (so not a visible bug, but fragile). Now removed that fragility. Audit notes: verified the dashboard Rates & Assumptions save handler reads ALL rendered fields (rates, per-person appraisal/bump months, grow-contributions toggle) after the v75 fix; verified every page reads from the same state + runProjection engine + shared resolvers (_emiEndIso, projectSavingsChain). A propagation self-test (change an input → confirm Projection income, Net Worth savings, and Net Worth total all react through the shared engine) is available to run from the console.
